title: ecliptica alba var. prostrata
intro: Ecliptica alba var. prostrata, also known as the White Eclipta or Eclipta, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This herb has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Eclipta include its ability to support liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Eclipta can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
